question: Two entry rules remain to confirm. (a) Pre-tax deferrals: are they taken off the top of income (before the expense-absorption rule), landing in tax-deferred accounts and invested at the Plan's target allocation at the moment of contribution — buy-and-hold thereafter, consistent with your no-rebalance rule? (b) For RMD-forced withdrawals exceeding expenses, the overage routes to the taxable account — but reinvested into *which* asset: the same/similar asset withdrawn from, or S&P 500?
